heading: Non-regular officers: status
label: 9191 Non-regular officers: status
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)849110:506d(h)., .Aug. 7, 1947, ch. 512, § 515(h)61 Stat. 908The first 12 words are substituted for 10:506d(h) (1st 11 words). The words “has the rights and privileges, and is entitled to the benefits” are substituted for the words “shall be entitled * * * to the same rights, privileges, and benefits”. Clause (1) is substituted for the words “in a grade the same as such ‘active-duty grade’ ”. The words “as the officer not of the Regular Air Force” are substituted for the words “holding appointment in the Army Reserve”. The words “his reserve grade” are substituted for the words “the grade held in the Army”.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 8491 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019

children.text: whose reserve grade is that in which the officer not of the Regular Air Force is serving;
who has the same length of service as the officer not of the Regular Air Force; and
who is on active duty in his reserve grade.
